raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Naloxone nasal spray can completely reverse a deadly opioid overdose by being sprayed in the nostrils.",
    "Naloxone has no significant side effects.",
    "Naloxone has no effect at all when mistakenly given to a person who has not taken opioids.",
    "In 2022, over 7,300 deaths were due to opioid overdoses in California.",
    "A growing number of opioid overdose deaths in California are among youth.",
    "1 out of every 5 youth deaths in California is now caused by an opioid overdose.",
    "More than half of the counterfeit prescription pills in the U.S. contain a potentially deadly dose of fentanyl.",
    "If fentanyl continues to be more accessible than naloxone, the number of overdose deaths will likely increase.",
    "The legislation described will increase the accessibility of naloxone in California.",
    "California will become a world leader in access to naloxone due to this legislation."
  ]
}
```
